mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, content, source_type, source_id, embedding, created_at FROM long_term_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM long_term_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, content, 1 - (embedding <=> #{queryVec}::vector) AS similarity FROM long_term_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND embedding IS NOT NULL AND 1 - (embedding <=> #{queryVec}::vector) > #{threshold} ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_memories SET content = #{content}, embedding = #{embedding}::vector WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO long_term_memories (user_id, content, source_type, embedding) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{sourceType}, #{embedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}::vector)
